boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Defense administration / logistics controls action now? Action: base access renewal while prior incident flag remains active. Boundary: access office note cannot ignore active flag.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact source control record closes boundary

final_answer: The controlling source record confirms the exact boundary is closed for this request. The policy says execution may proceed only when current source records close the requested action boundary, and the controlling control record does so here. The communication note cannot override that closure. Action may proceed.
